title: Response to an inspection report on clandestine entrants to the UK
body: "The Home Office response to the Independent Chief Inspector of Borders and Immigration’s report titled: An inspection of the Border Force operation to deter and detect clandestine entrants to the UK  The Home Office has accepted 2 recommendations and partially accepted 4 recommendations.  Date of inspection: August to January 2025.  "

taxons.title: Inspections of border, immigration and asylum services
